Propsearch navigate_next Area Guides navigate_next Grand Polo Club and Resort Guide

Grand Polo Club and Resort

Grand Polo Club and Resort is a mixed-use district in Dubai Investments Park 2. It is currently at the planning stage with construction yet to start.
travel_explore
Overview
home_work
Properties
Updated 19 May 2026
Share this page
Share this page
WhatsApp X.com LinkedIn Email
Overview
place
Area
Dubai Investments Park 2
donut_small
Overview
Grand Polo Club and Resort is an area located within Dubai Investments Park 2, Dubai.
shield
The developer
The project is a development by Emaar Properties.
pool
Amenities
Amenities will include an amphitheatre, barbecue facilities, a basketball half-court, a clubhouse, a community centre, a dog park, a fitness area, a football pitch, landscaped gardens, a miniature golf course, a multi-purpose sports area, a padel tennis court, a picnic area, a pump track, stables, swimming pools, a volleyball court, a walking track, a water feature and yoga and meditation areas.
tips_and_updates
Additional information
stop

The masterplan comprises thirteen residential clusters: Chevalia Estate, Chevalia Estate 2, Chevalia Fields, Montura 1, 2 and 3, Selvara 1, 2, 3 and 4, Equiterra, Equiterra 2, and Equestra.

stop

The equestrian sports area includes three polo fields, three jumping arenas, multiple paddocks, a vareo track, horse stables, viewing decks and a social tack lounge.

stop

A network of pedestrian and cycling paths and various community asset zones has been integrated throughout the site.

stop

Extensive green spaces loop and branch across the development to connect the residences and the expansive linear park.

calendar_month
Timeline
A
p
r
2
0
2
5

Emaar has officially unveiled its latest masterplan, Grand Polo Club & Resort, a luxury equestrian community in Dubai spanning 5.54 million square metres and located minutes from the upcoming expansion of Al Maktoum International Airport.

F
e
b
2
0
2
4

Emaar Properties has announced the launch of two ambitious projects in Dubai: The Heights Country Club, an 81 million square feet development valued at  55 billion, and the Grand Club Resort, a 60 million square feet project valued at  41 billion, featuring luxury villas, townhouses, and wellness facilities.

import_contacts
Excerpts from the brochure
format_quote
‘A manifestation of luxurious living, blending the heritage of captivating equestrian experiences with seamless landscapes exuding modernity.’
format_quote
‘A lifestyle that offers an opportunity to be one with nature, every day.’
format_quote
‘By using landscape berms and expansive lawns, the Green Core is created for a harmonious environment that emphasises on the beauty of the exclusive equestrian experiences it has to offer.’
format_quote
‘A regal home where the finest of inspired architecture, panoramas and experiences come together.’
format_quote
‘A lifestyle dipped in ultimate opulence where every day unfolds like a poetic narrative.’

Masterplan

A look at the original masterplan published by the developer at the time of the launch of Grand Polo Club and Resort.

Design Stage

Images depicting the initial concept designs for Grand Polo Club and Resort.

Projects often go through a number of design revisions as they progress and developers may or may not honour their original plans when it comes to architectural designs, amenities and landscaping. The images below are provided as a means to compare the original plans with the realised development.

Nearby neighbourhoods

Explore communities that are either adjacent or close to Grand Polo Club and Resort.
Dubai Investments Park (4.8 km)
A mixed-use complex consisting of three major zones - an industrial complex, a commercial complex and seven residential communities.
Read more
Remraam (5.0 km)
A popular community of two neighbourhoods housing 56 low-rise apartment buildings set in parkland and served by community facilities.
Read more
Jumeirah Golf Estates (6.3 km)
A collection of 13 luxury estates set around two 18-hole golf courses that have hosted the Dubai World Championship since 2008.
Read more
Green Community (6.7 km)
A community in Dubai Investments Park containing apartments, villas, leisure, retail, and commercial properties set in natural greenery.
Read more
Damac Hills (7.3 km)
A gated community with opulent villas and apartments dotted around the Trump International Golf Club and 40 hectares of parkland.
Read more
Midtown by Deyaar (7.8 km)
A development project in Dubai Production City comprising six districts containing 24 buildings housing studios and apartments.
Read more
Sports City (7.8 km)
A residential district built around five major sports venues. The residences consist of apartments, townhouses and villas.
Read more
Dubai Production City (7.9 km)
A business free zone geared towards companies specialising in graphic art, printing, publishing, packaging and media production.
Read more

About Propsearch

Propsearch.ae is a Dubai property portal that hosts ads from a number of local real estate agencies. In addition we offer a comprehensive set of community and building guides to help property buyers, renters and investors learn about the areas and buildings that they may wish to live or invest in.

Any enquiries sent regarding a specific property go directly to the estate agent that advertised the property and Propsearch does not play any role in any transactions that may result. Enquires that are sent directly to Propsearch are forwarded to a trusted partner agency that is best suited to handle the enquiry.

Please note that whilst we have a large database of buildings and developments, Propsearch is not a property developer, nor an agent, nor an architect, nor a construction contractor.
